subject: error running ts_cft with --fit_phase
body:
Hi!

I have data I collected using the VPP.

For fs_motion_and_ctf I used --c_fit_phase and things worked well (inspected with filter_quality)

By mistake I ran ts_ctf and forgot to add --fit_phase.  It ran with no problem.

However, when I added the --fit_phase I got

window = 512
range_low = 30
